# Karlsruhe Institute of Technology (KIT) Rankings 2026
##### Public
###### University Type
* Overview
* Courses
* Ranking
* Admission

The Karlsruhe University of Technology is a research university. Its focus is to contribute to the global challenges of energy, information, and mobility. Their mission is to impart knowledge from fundamental research to excellence. They excel in academics like economics, engineering, social sciences, and Humanities. Alm their programs are research-based to make the students real-world-ready. They have departments in engineering, architecture, economics, humanities and social sciences, informatics, mathematics, etc.

The rankings of this university are noteworthy. The Karlsruhe university QS ranking is 141 for 2022. The national ranking is The shanghai international ranking is 201-300, and the national ranking is 10-19. The Karlsruhe University world ranking is 189 for 2022. The education rank is 470
